scripts.cy:report:rider: wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cypress run --spec 'cypress/e2e/rider/**' && start cypress\reports\index.html
scripts.cy:report:driver: wait-on http://localhost:3001 && cypress run --spec 'cypress/e2e/driver/**' && start cypress\reports\index.html
scripts.cy:report:admin: wait-on http://localhost:3002 && cypress run --spec 'cypress/e2e/admin/**' && start cypress\reports\index.html
